ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or area */,
  "unicef_reporting_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UNICEF reporting region */,
  "unicef_programme_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UNICEF programme region */,
  "world_bank_income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the World Bank income group */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the country in latitude and longitude format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_unicef_reporting_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("unicef_reporting_region_id") REFERENCES unicef_reporting_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_world_bank_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_bank_income_group_id") REFERENCES world_bank_income_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_unicef_programme_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("unicef_programme_region_id") REFERENCES unicef_programme_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unicef_reporting_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UNICEF reporting region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the UNICEF reporting region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UNICEF reporting region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unicef_programme_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UNICEF programme region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the UNICEF programme region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UNICEF programme region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "world_bank_income_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each World Bank income group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the World Bank income group */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income group */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country the dataset pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "short_source" TEXT /* Short name of the data source */,
  "long_source" TEXT /* Long name or detailed description of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source_link" TEXT /* Link to the original data source */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES countries ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the indicators belong to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "national" REAL /* National average value */,
  "male" REAL /* Value for males */,
  "female" REAL /* Value for females */,
  "rural" REAL /* Value for rural areas */,
  "urban" REAL /* Value for urban areas */,
  "poorest" REAL /* Value for the poorest quintile */,
  "second" REAL /* Value for the second quintile */,
  "middle" REAL /* Value for the middle quintile */,
  "fourth" REAL /* Value for the fourth quintile */,
  "richest" REAL /* Value for the richest quintile */,
  "none" REAL /* Percentage of population with no education */,
  "primary" REAL /* Percentage of population with primary education */,
  "sec_and_higher" REAL /* Percentage of population with secondary and higher education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the dataset */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Link to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_types" (
  "survey_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey type */,
  "survey_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_type_id")
)
